subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Two successive letters from thee were received, and both served as sufficient proof that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر میثاق دو مکتوب پی در پی از شما رسید و هر دو دلیل کافی بود بر اینکه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @review of publications, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @harmony of science and religion, @unity; oneness of humanity, @call to action
